text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The orientations for new trainers are taking up a lot more time than I
expected... I'm reading through a manual as I walk when suddenly—
WATCH OUUUT!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Student
text_block_list.text: Eep! Sorry, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I stand there stunned as a student barrels past, missing me by an inch. If I hadn't stopped... Gulp...

ARE YOU ALL RIGHT?! You've gotta keep your eyes on where you're
going. You could've got seriously hurt!
choice_data_list: Yeah, you're right. Sorry about that, um...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory! Tracen's one and only... Disciplinary Committee
Chair!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
From now on, don't walk while distracted, and watch out for other
pedestrians! Let's keep the halls safe for everyone to use, okay?
Bamboo, out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she tears away down the corridor. I guess the rule to "always run in the halls" is real, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I'm remembering right, she's a pre-debut student. Seeing as she
helped me and all, I make a note to check out her running some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that "some time" comes just a few days later. After the day's
classroom lessons, I spot Bamboo Memory doing warm-ups by the
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sweet, looks like I'm good to go! Thanks for another perfect stretch
session, Instructor!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
No, thank you for always taking your warm-ups so seriously. Now
then, I'm going to go help the others. Take care not to over-exert
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike us personal trainers, Tracen's instructors direct group lessons.
Unfortunately, this means they have less time to devote to
individuals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After checking up on Bamboo Memory, the instructor moves on to
another racer.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Twenty-eight, twenty-nine, thirty! One down, eight sets to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This kind of fitness training is dull and repetitive, but she vigorously
works through her routine without a single complaint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lot of the Umamusume here are so passionate about running, they
gloss over the boring stuff like this. It's impressive to see a runner
taking the basics this seriously.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After her stretches and warm-ups, Bamboo Memory hits the dirt track.
choice_data_list:
(Those powerful strides are perfect for dirt!
But...)

(Those powerful strides are perfect for dirt!
But...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: C'mon, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something about her... like her eyes are fixed on something
far, far away.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo, it's about time for me to take the equipment back. It's
getting late, so please wrap up your run.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course, Instructor! Do you have a minute to check one thing first,
though?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text: Certainly. What is it?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try going full speed on the turf for a lap! I'm in great shape
today, and my nails are fine, see?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, they do appear to be in good condition. That said, I'm not a
personal trainer, so I'm only qualified to give general advice. Is that
all right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
ABSOLUTELY! I would appreciate any feedback a ton! ALL RIGHT!
Look out, turf, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory flies down the turf track with light, but powerful
steps. She's so fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Way better. She's so clearly geared for turf, I'm confused why they've got her training for dirt.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Instructor! Take a look at my feet! My nails are completely fine—not
even a crack!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That means they're strong enough for the Tracen Meet, right?! I can enter one of the turf races, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Meet is a large academy-wide event held twice a year.
The big draw is that all students are welcome to enter all races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an opportunity for pre-debut Umamusume to run with more
experienced students, and it attracts a good amount of attention from
racing fans.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...I won't stop you if your heart's set on it, but I wouldn't advise it. You
know that your nails are weaker than others'.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But—but they're in such good condition now!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Because dirt puts less strain on them, compared to turf. If you
switched tracks, your feet would require constant attention and care.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
As much as I wish I could provide that level of guidance... I have a
responsibility to guide all the students in my class, not just you.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, it's your decision, but... I would recommend focusing on
building up muscles for now, and leave the transition to turf until after
you've debuted.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. Then just for now—just for now, I'll stick it out on dirt for a little longer and see how things go.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't given up on the Tracen Meet yet! I still wanna run a turf
race, so... sorry, Instructor!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...Quite all right. Just promise that you won't push yourself too hard.
Speaking of which, let's pack things up for today!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Roger that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd imagine this situation is fairly common. A lot of the high-profile
races in Japan are for turf, so racers have more opportunities there
than on dirt.
choice_data_list:
Bamboo Memory almost seems more focused on
the Tracen Meet than turf itself, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wanted to build up her legs for a long-term career, then I'd
agree with her instructor—there's no need to risk turf this early.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which leads me to think, there's more to this. There's something she's
after, but I spend the rest of the day stumped as to what it could be.
